logo.icon: dotted circle / halftone dot pattern in accent color

typography.style: large, bold, high-contrast headings — editorial feel
typography.scale: oversized headings dominate the layout (inspired by Sofinnova Partners)
typography.notes: TT Firs Neue is used exclusively for all headings and display text. Load via @font-face from /public/fonts/

layout.columns: asymmetric — large heading left, body text bottom-right
layout.card_grid: 5-column grid with bordered cards, category label top-left, name bottom-left, icon bottom-right
layout.section_transitions: alternating light/dark sections for contrast and rhythm
layout.border_radius: minimal — sharp edges preferred, pill shape only for CTA buttons

navbar.cta_button: pill shape, dark fill, white text

hero.layout: full-bleed text, no imagery in hero

job_cards.hover_state: invert to dark background with accent text
job_cards.info_layout: category top-left, job title bottom-left, arrow or plus icon bottom-right

decorative_element.color: white on dark, or dark on light

photography.style: aspirational but real — offices, city skylines, people in professional settings

examples.bad: We offer a comprehensive suite of career solutions.

key_elements_borrowed: large geometric circle as decorative element
asymmetric text layout (heading left, body bottom-right)
